title: Otites viridiflorus
intro: The plant Otites viridiflorus, also known as green-flowering otite or green-flowering otitis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Otites viridiflorus include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Otites viridiflorus is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to create remedies for colds, fever, and skin irritations.
